---
title: "Modelling part"
output: pdf_document
date: "2026-05-13"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
p_needed <- c('tidyverse', 'mlogit', 'nnet', 'margins', 'marginaleffects', 'broom', 'summarytools', "MASS", 'kableExtra')
packages <- rownames(installed.packages())
p_to_install <- p_needed[!(p_needed %in% packages)]
if (length(p_to_install) > 0) {
  install.packages(p_to_install) 
}
sapply(p_needed, require, character.only = TRUE)
options(warn = -1)
```

```{r}
# see datacollection.R
# load the main dataframe
df <- read.csv('datasources/df_essay.csv')
```

```{r}
# create a dependent variables for a multinomial model
df_final <- df %>%
  mutate(
    onset_type = case_when(
      `NVC2.1_VIOL` == 1 ~ "Violent",
      `NVC2.1_NONVIOL` == 1 ~ "Nonviolent",
      TRUE ~ "No onset"
    ),
    onset_type = factor(
      onset_type,
      levels = c("No onset", "Nonviolent", "Violent")
    )
  )
```

```{r}
# load functions for multinomial model simulations
source('simulation_functions.R')
```


```{r}
#H1: more EGIP, the more likely a nonviolent campaign
model_h1_count <- multinom( #test the hypothesis of the discriminated groups share effect
  onset_type ~ log_growup_egip_groups_count_l + log_growup_excl_groups_count_l +
    log_oilrents_l + log_gdp_pcap_l + pop_log_l + gdp_growth_l +
    v2x_execorr_l + v2x_polyarchy_l + I(v2x_polyarchy_l^2) +
    log_v2regdur_l + swid_gini_disp_l + as.factor(cow) + as.factor(year),
  data = df_final, maxit = 1000 #the default number of iterations is not enough 
)

model_h1_share <- multinom( #test the hypothesis of the discriminated groups share effect
  onset_type ~ growup_legippop_l + growup_lexclpop_l +
    log_oilrents_l + log_gdp_pcap_l + pop_log_l + gdp_growth_l +
    v2x_execorr_l + v2x_polyarchy_l + I(v2x_polyarchy_l^2) +
    log_v2regdur_l + swid_gini_disp_l + as.factor(cow) + as.factor(year),
  data = df_final, maxit = 1000 #the default number of iterations is not enough 
)
```

```{r}
vcov_h1_count <- vcov(model_h1_count)
vcov_h1_share <- vcov(model_h1_share)
```

```{r}
results_h1_count <- simulate_predictions(model = model_h1_count, data = df_final, focal_var = 'log_growup_egip_groups_count_l', outcome_var = 'onset_type', vcov_mat = vcov_h1_count, probs_seq = c(0.1, 1))  # ← skip the sparse tails entirely)
results_h1_share <- simulate_predictions(model = model_h1_share, data = df_final, focal_var = 'growup_legippop_l', outcome_var = 'onset_type', vcov_mat = vcov_h1_share, probs_seq = c(0.10, 0.90))
```

```{r}
x_min <- exp(quantile(df_final$log_growup_excl_groups_count_l, 0.01, na.rm = TRUE))
x_max <- exp(quantile(df_final$log_growup_excl_groups_count_l, 0.99, na.rm = TRUE))

ggplot(results_h1_count %>% dplyr::filter(category %in% c('Nonviolent', 'Violent'), 
                                          x_val <= log(14 + 1)), 
       aes(x = exp(x_val), y = ev_mean)) +
  geom_line() +
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = ev_lo, ymax = ev_hi), alpha = 0.1) +
  facet_wrap(~category) +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = 0:14) + 
  labs(x = "Discriminated population count", y = "Avg. predicted probability") +
  theme_bw()

ggplot(results_h1_share %>% dplyr::filter(category %in% c('Nonviolent', 'Violent')), aes(x = x_val, y = ev_mean)) +
  geom_line() +
  #geom_point() + 
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = ev_lo, ymax = ev_hi), alpha = 0.1) +
  facet_wrap(~category) +
  labs(x = "Discriminated population share", y = "Avg. predicted probability") +
  theme_bw()
```

```{r}
# estimate a two-way FE model (country-year) with lagged independent variables
# to reduce reversed causality problems
# the specifications includes discriminated population share and share of ethnic groups in power
# controls: oilrents, GDP, GDP growth, executive corruption, democracy (quadratic term added), 
# regime duration, GINI coefficient (disposable income)
model <- multinom( #test the hypothesis of the discriminated groups share effect
  onset_type ~ growup_discrimpop_l + growup_egippop_l +
    log_oilrents_l + log_gdp_pcap_l + pop_log_l + gdp_growth_l +
    v2x_execorr_l + v2x_polyarchy_l + I(v2x_polyarchy_l^2) +
    log_v2regdur_l + swid_gini_disp_l + as.factor(cow) + as.factor(year),
  data = df_final, maxit = 1000 #the default number of iterations is not enough 
)
model2 <- multinom( #test the interaction effect hypothesis
  onset_type ~ growup_discrimpop_l  * growup_egippop_l +
    log_oilrents_l + log_gdp_pcap_l + pop_log_l + gdp_growth_l +
    v2x_execorr_l + v2x_polyarchy_l + I(v2x_polyarchy_l^2) +
    log_v2regdur_l + swid_gini_disp_l + as.factor(cow) + as.factor(year),
  data = df_final, maxit = 1000 #the default number of iterations is not enough 
)
model3 <- multinom( #test the hypothesis of the excluded groups count effect
  onset_type ~ growup_excl_groups_count_l + growup_egip_groups_count_l +
    log_oilrents_l + log_gdp_pcap_l + pop_log_l + gdp_growth_l +
    v2x_execorr_l + v2x_polyarchy_l + I(v2x_polyarchy_l^2) +
    log_v2regdur_l + swid_gini_disp_l + as.factor(cow) + as.factor(year),
  data = df_final, maxit = 1000 #the default number of iterations is not enough 
)
model4 <- multinom( #test the interaction effect hypothesis
  onset_type ~ growup_excl_groups_count_l * growup_egip_groups_count_l +
    log_oilrents_l + log_gdp_pcap_l + pop_log_l + gdp_growth_l +
    v2x_execorr_l + v2x_polyarchy_l + I(v2x_polyarchy_l^2) +
    log_v2regdur_l + swid_gini_disp_l + as.factor(cow) + as.factor(year),
  data = df_final, maxit = 1000 #the default number of iterations is not enough 
)
```


```{r, results = 'asis'}
#print a coefficient tables
df_raw <- tidy(model, conf.int = FALSE) |>
  dplyr::filter(!str_detect(term, "as.factor")) |>
  dplyr::mutate(
    term = dplyr::recode(term,
      "growup_discrimpop_l"  = "Discriminated population share",
      "growup_egippop_l"     = "EGI population share",
      "log_oilrents_l"       = "Oil rents (log)",
      "log_gdp_pcap_l"       = "GDP per capita (log)",
      "pop_log_l"            = "Population (log)",
      "gdp_growth_l"         = "GDP growth",
      "v2x_execorr_l"        = "Executive corruption",
      "v2x_polyarchy_l"      = "Polyarchy",
      "I(v2x_polyarchy_l^2)" = "Polyarchy$^{2}$",
      "log_v2regdur_l"       = "Regime duration (log)",
      "swid_gini_disp_l"     = "Gini (disposable)"
    ),
    stars = dplyr::case_when(
      p.value < 0.001 ~ "***",
      p.value < 0.01  ~ "**",
      p.value < 0.05  ~ "*",
      TRUE            ~ ""
    ),
    coef = paste0(round(estimate, 3), stars),
    se   = paste0("(", round(std.error, 3), ")")
  )

# Coefficient rows
coef_rows <- df_raw |>
  dplyr::select(term, y.level, coef) |>
  tidyr::pivot_wider(names_from = y.level, values_from = coef)

# SE rows — blank term label
se_rows <- df_raw |>
  dplyr::select(term, y.level, se) |>
  tidyr::pivot_wider(names_from = y.level, values_from = se) |>
  dplyr::mutate(term = "")

# Interleave: coef row then SE row for each variable
result <- dplyr::bind_rows(
  coef_rows |> dplyr::mutate(ord = (dplyr::row_number() - 1) * 2 + 1),
  se_rows   |> dplyr::mutate(ord = (dplyr::row_number() - 1) * 2 + 2)
) |>
  dplyr::arrange(ord) |>
  dplyr::select(-ord)

# Table
result |>
  kable(
    format    = "latex",
    booktabs  = TRUE,
    escape    = FALSE,
    linesep   = "",                        # remove automatic row spacing    
    col.names = c("", "Nonviolent", "Violent"),
    caption   = "Multinomial logit estimates"
  ) |>
  kable_styling(
    latex_options = c("hold_position", "scale_down"),
    font_size = 10
  ) |>
  footnote(
  general = c(
    "Country and year fixed effects included.",
    "All independent variables are one year lagged",
    "Standard errors in parentheses.",
    "* p<0.05, ** p<0.01, *** p<0.001"
  ),
    escape  = FALSE
  )
```


```{r}
#extract the variance-covariance table
vcov_multinom <- vcov(model)
vcov_multinom2 <- vcov(model2)
vcov_multinom3 <- vcov(model3)
vcov_multinom4 <- vcov(model4)
```

```{r}
results_df <- simulate_predictions(model = model, data = df_final, focal_var = 'growup_discrimpop_l', outcome_var = 'onset_type', vcov_mat = vcov_multinom)
results_df2 <- simulate_predictions(model = model2, data = df_final, focal_var = 'growup_discrimpop_l', outcome_var = 'onset_type', vcov_mat = vcov_multinom2, moderator_var  = "growup_egippop_l", moderator_vals = quantile(df_final$growup_egippop_l, c(0.1, 0.9), na.rm=TRUE))
results_df3 <- simulate_predictions(model = model3, data = df_final, focal_var = 'growup_excl_groups_count_l', outcome_var = 'onset_type', vcov_mat = vcov_multinom3)
results_df4 <- simulate_predictions(model = model4, data = df_final, focal_var = 'growup_excl_groups_count_l', outcome_var = 'onset_type', vcov_mat = vcov_multinom4, moderator_var = 'growup_egip_groups_count_l', moderator_vals = quantile(df_final$growup_egip_groups_count_l, c(0.1, 0.9), na.rm=TRUE))
```


```{r}
#results_df
```

```{r, fig.cap = 'Expected probabilities of event type by the values of discriminated population share', fig.align = 'center', fig.dim = c(8,4), echo = FALSE, message = FALSE, warning = FALSE}
#plot the results
# The main finding is for violent - the increase in the discriminated population share increases
# the likelihood of a violent maximalist campaign onset from 0.01 to 0.14 (there are 0.02 of violent events in the dataset)
ggplot(results_df %>% dplyr::filter(category %in% c('Nonviolent', 'Violent')), aes(x = x_val, y = ev_mean)) +
  geom_line() +
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = ev_lo, ymax = ev_hi), alpha = 0.1) +
  facet_wrap(~category) +
  labs(x = "Discriminated population share", y = "Avg. predicted probability") +
  theme_bw()

ggplot(results_df2 %>% dplyr::filter(category %in% c('Nonviolent', 'Violent')), aes(x = x_val, y = ev_mean, color = moderator_val, fill = moderator_val)) +
  geom_line() +
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = ev_lo, ymax = ev_hi), alpha = 0.1) +
  facet_wrap(~category) +
  labs(x = "Discriminated population share", y = "Avg. predicted probability", color = "EGI groups (low/high)",
    fill  = "EGI groups (low/high)") +
  theme_bw()

ggplot(results_df3 %>% dplyr::filter(category %in% c('Nonviolent', 'Violent')), aes(x = x_val, y = ev_mean)) +
  geom_line() +
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = ev_lo, ymax = ev_hi), alpha = 0.1) +
  facet_wrap(~category) +
  labs(x = "Discriminated population share", y = "Avg. predicted probability") +
  theme_bw()

ggplot(results_df4 %>% dplyr::filter(category %in% c('Nonviolent', 'Violent')), aes(x = x_val, y = ev_mean, color = moderator_val, fill = moderator_val)) +
  geom_line() +
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = ev_lo, ymax = ev_hi), alpha = 0.1) +
  facet_wrap(~category) +
  labs(x = "Discriminated population share", y = "Avg. predicted probability", color = "EGI groups (low/high)",
    fill  = "EGI groups (low/high)") +
  theme_bw()
```

```{r}
ggplot(results_df2 %>% dplyr::filter(category %in% c('Nonviolent', 'Violent')), aes(x = x_val, y = ev_mean, color = moderator_val, fill = moderator_val)) +
  geom_line() +
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = ev_lo, ymax = ev_hi), alpha = 0.1) +
  facet_wrap(~category + moderator_val) +
  labs(x = "Discriminated population share", y = "Avg. predicted probability", color = "EGI groups (low/high)",
    fill  = "EGI groups (low/high)") +
  theme_bw()
```


```{r, fig.cap = 'Expected probabilities of event type by the values of discriminated population share - one plot', fig.align = 'center', fig.dim = c(8,4), echo = FALSE, message = FALSE, warning = FALSE}
#plot in one grah - does not look so nice
ggplot(results_df %>% dplyr::filter(category %in% c('Nonviolent', 'Violent')), aes(x = x_val, y = ev_mean, color = category, fill = category)) +
  geom_line() +
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = ev_lo, ymax = ev_hi), alpha = 0.1, color = NA) +
  labs(
    x     = "Discriminated population share",
    y     = "Avg. predicted probability",
    color = "Onset type",
    fill  = "Onset type"
  ) +
  theme_bw()
```
```{r}
model2 <- multinom(
  onset_type ~ growup_discrimpop_l * growup_egippop_l +
    log_oilrents_l + log_gdp_pcap_l + pop_log_l + gdp_growth_l +
    v2x_execorr_l + v2x_polyarchy_l + I(v2x_polyarchy_l^2) +
    log_v2regdur_l + swid_gini_disp_l + as.factor(cow) + as.factor(year),
  data = df_final, maxit = 1000 #the default number of iterations is not enough 
)
```

```{r}
X         <- model.matrix(model)
col_discr <- which(colnames(X) == "growup_discrimpop_l")
col_egi   <- which(colnames(X) == "growup_egippop_l")
col_inter <- which(colnames(X) == "growup_discrimpop_l:growup_egippop_l")

egi_vals <- quantile(df_final$growup_egippop_l, 
                     c(0.1, 0.9), na.rm = TRUE)

xseq <- seq(
  quantile(df_final$growup_discrimpop_l, 0.01, na.rm = TRUE),
  quantile(df_final$growup_discrimpop_l, 0.99, na.rm = TRUE),
  length.out = 20
)

K_minus_1 <- nrow(coef(model))
coefs_vec <- as.vector(t(coef(model)))

ova_results <- lapply(names(egi_vals), function(egi_label) {
  egi_val <- egi_vals[egi_label]
  
  lapply(xseq, function(x_val) {
    
    # OVA: substitute focal variable and moderator, update interaction
    X_mod                <- X
    X_mod[, col_discr]   <- x_val
    X_mod[, col_egi]     <- egi_val
    X_mod[, col_inter]   <- x_val * egi_val   # critical: update interaction term
    
    sim_out <- sim_function(
      seed      = 666,
      nsim      = 1000,
      coefs     = coefs_vec,
      vcov      = vcov_multinom,
      scenario  = X_mod,
      K_minus_1 = K_minus_1
    )
    s
    ev <- sim_out$ev   # [nsim x K]
    
    data.frame(
      x_val     = x_val,
      egi_level = egi_label,         # "10%", "50%", "90%"
      category  = cat_names,
      ev_mean   = colMeans(ev),
      ev_lo     = apply(ev, 2, quantile, 0.025),
      ev_hi     = apply(ev, 2, quantile, 0.975)
    )
  }) |> dplyr::bind_rows()
  
}) |> dplyr::bind_rows()
```

```{r}
ggplot(ova_results, aes(x = x_val, y = ev_mean, 
                         color = egi_level, fill = egi_level)) +
  geom_line() +
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = ev_lo, ymax = ev_hi), alpha = 0.1, color = NA) +
  facet_wrap(~category) +
  labs(
    x     = "Discriminated population share",
    y     = "Avg. predicted probability",
    color = "EGI share percentile",
    fill  = "EGI share percentile"
  ) +
  theme_bw()
```
